  "findings": [
    "Excessive skirtboard gap wear observed on the conveyor system, creating a material spillage hazard and potential pinch points."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Adjust or replace the worn skirtboard sealing system to establish the correct gap profile according to CEMA standards.",
    "Verify that the skirtboard containment system does not create an entrapment hazard under OSHA 1910.212."
  ],
  "rationale": "The conveyor skirtboard exhibits excessive gap wear at the rough-complete stage. According to CEMA guidelines, proper skirtboard clearance and sealing are critical to prevent material spillage, belt damage, and dust emissions. Additionally, improper gaps can create hazardous pinch points or entrapment zones under OSHA 1910.212. Because the system is roughed in but exhibits wear/defects before final closeout, it fails compliance.",
  "references": [
    "CEMA Belt Conveyors for Bulk Materials",
    "OSHA 1910.212"
  ]
}
